x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Space inventory is the core dataset Now Assist WSD uses for AI space recommendations. Without sufficient space records, AI cannot suggest appropriate workspaces or analyze occupancy patterns.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: total + " spaces. Now Assist WSD has sufficient space data for AI-powered space recommendations and occupancy analysis." }; } else if (total >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces (target: 100+). Now Assist WSD AI space recommendations will have limited coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces. Insufficient space data for meaningful Now Assist WSD AI recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate the space inventory in Workplace Core. Import floor plans and space data to ensure Now Assist WSD has sufficient space records for AI-powered recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cbb
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Space inventory is the core dataset Now Assist WSD uses for AI space recommendations. Without sufficient space records, AI cannot suggest appropriate workspaces or analyze occupancy patterns.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Space Inventory Volume</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_core_space"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: total + " spaces. Now Assist WSD has sufficient space data for AI-powered space recommendations and occupancy analysis." }; } else if (total >= 20) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces (target: 100+). Now Assist WSD AI space recommendations will have limited coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " space records in inventory", finding: "Only " + total + " spaces. Insufficient space data for meaningful Now Assist WSD AI recommendations." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>WSD</module> <number>CHK0006224</number> <order>200</order> <remediation_guidance>Populate the space inventory in Workplace Core. Import floor plans and space data to ensure Now Assist WSD has sufficient space records for AI-powered recommendations.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>5603e33acfd903108935fb251d851cbb</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
